text:
Created attachment 192616
patch to update the port

- Update 1.25 --> 1.26
Changes: https://github.com/mrscotty/connector/commits/master
- "portlint -AC" just warns about non-empty $FreeBSD$ tag.
- Tested with poudriere 3.2.99.20180328 at 11.1-release-amd64 with perl 5.26.1
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail say: "PASS".
